caption: A man wearing a tall, pointed grey wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white collared shirt with a red bow tie and white suspenders. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous small, framed photographs, and a clothing rack with garments is visible in the background. On-screen text and logos appear on the left and right sides of the frame, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" beneath a graphic of a microphone. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a static position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to talk, with his mouth moving and his head tilting subtly. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man from the chest up.
